Open questions: What decision or counsel is being requested from Deacons?. File name: docs/communications/church-business-meeting-summary.md. Type of document: Communication draft. Purpose: Provide calm plain-language summary for congregation if needed.. Current status: Draft. Related committee/body: Pastor, Deacons, Finance Committee, Personnel Committee, Congregation. Handbook: No. Open questions: When should this be presented and what motions, if any, accompany it?.
